  "claims": [
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has greatly exacerbated mental health issues among school-aged youth.",
    "Prior to the COVID-19 pandemic, one in five children exhibited signs of a mental health disorder.",
    "California adolescents report higher rates of depressive symptoms than the national average.",
    "The proportion of emergency room visits related to mental health crises has increased dramatically for young children and adolescents since the start of the pandemic.",
    "25 percent of respondents between the ages of 18-24 had contemplated suicide in the previous 30 days according to a recent CDC report.",
